explanations.a: Correct. Buchholz relay is used only in oil cooled transformers (with conservator tank).
explanations.b: Incorrect. Air cooled transformers (dry type) do not have oil, so Buchholz relay cannot be used.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Transmission lines use different protection schemes.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Generators use differential protection, not Buchholz relay.

questions.question: Buchholz relay operates on the principle of-

explanations.a: Incorrect. Overcurrent is for other relays.
explanations.c: Correct. Buchholz relay operates when gas accumulates due to decomposition of oil during internal faults.

answers.a: Between of transformer tank and conservator

explanations.a: Correct. Buchholz relay is installed in the pipe connecting the main transformer tank to the conservator.
explanations.b: Incorrect. It is not inside the conservator.
explanations.c: Incorrect. It is not inside the main tank.

questions.question: Buchholz relay is used for protection of transformer from

answers.a: The flow of excessively high current
answers.b: Low level of oil in main tank

explanations.a: Incorrect. High current is handled by overcurrent relays.
explanations.b: Correct. Buchholz relay detects low oil level and gas accumulation.

explanations.a: Correct. Buchholz relay is a protective safety device that trips the circuit breaker during internal faults.
explanations.b: Incorrect. It is not a control device.
explanations.d: Incorrect. It is a mechanical relay with electrical contacts.
